Manual battle attempt reached a playable tactical state or a changed failure mode: phase unavailable; spAdvance=false; composer=false; lockIn=false; no movement error captured
Starmap loaded during the deep-play sweep without the prior canvas crash signature.

journeys.persona: host and guest proving co-op campaign and 1v1 lobby handoff surfaces

steps.title: seed host and guest vault identities
host creates and guest joins co-op campaign
skip guest ledger check because co-op join did not connect
host creates 1v1 match and guest joins lobby

findings.summary: Harness uses MULTIPLAYER_STORE=durable for Playwright; it does not reproduce the plain-dev in-memory split-store C3 path. Host campaign=campaign-1783540636417-t81jl3s, guest campaign=none, host badge=none, guest badge=none, join error=No room code rendered for host campaign..
Guest ledger projection check was skipped because the co-op join never reached a guest campaign route.

1v1 lobby occupied=true; host alpha="Alpha #1Deep Play HostNot readyLeaveReadySet AI", host bravo="Bravo #1pid_BdVD7JZqLcXHkYThD9deMbHuuKYNot readySet AI", guest alpha="Alpha #1Deep Play HostNot ready", guest bravo="Bravo #1pid_BdVD7JZqLcXHkYThD9deMbHuuKYNot readyLeaveReady".

journeys.persona: campaign GM validating ledger interventions and the tactical GM dock

steps.title: add four units and four assigned pilots
submit campaign wizard and land on dashboard
open campaign GM ledger
notes: Merchant preview=ready, approval=ApprovalApproved and applied to campaign state., playerLog=Player Action LogMerchant charge corrected by +2,500.00 C-bills.Finances - approved, privateLog=GM LedgerMerchant charge corrected by +2,500.00 C-bills.Hidden campaign merchant reversal: duplicated charge from a black-market branch.Without this GM action the duplicated merchant charge remains on the campaign ledger.Merchant inventory clue remains GM-only until the players discover it in play..

steps.title: generate and approve merchant ledger correction
preview merchant conflict blocked approval
notes: Time cascade preview=2026-07-08 -> 2026-07-10 (2 days); external effects=none rendered. Current UI renders summary plus effects list, not a per-day expanded breakdown.

steps.title: return to dashboard before battle setup save
select roster and launch mission to pre-battle
open manual battle before switching to GM query mode

findings.summary: Merchant correction preview and approval were captured with player/private ledger split evidence.
Merchant conflict correction was captured in the blocked approval state.
Time cascade correction was captured with the full current preview panel; UI currently exposes a summary/effects list rather than per-day breakdown.
